ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of HelioCare Analytics, Inc. by CareVista Therapeutics, Inc. (U.S. issuer; healthcare analytics)
Purchase Price and Structure: $210,000,000 (cash and CareVista common stock); customary working capital adjustments; no financing out.
Financing: Committed debt facility from Orchard Ridge Bank, N.A., subject to GLBA-compliant KYC and vendor onboarding forms (Annex C) and bank privacy notice alignment.
Selective Disclosure: Mutual NDA required; no selective disclosure to lenders, vendors, or sell-side unless a concurrent press release/8-K is filed; Rule 10b-5 anti-fraud undertakings incorporated.
Conditions to Closing: HSR filing required; no OCC change-of-control approvals are applicable (no bank target); customary board and stockholder approvals for both parties.

Selective Disclosure: Mutual NDA required; no selective disclosure to lenders, vendors, or sell-side unless a concurrent press release/8-K is filed; Rule 10b-5 anti-fraud undertakings incorporated.

Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of HelioCare Analytics, Inc. by CareVista Therapeutics, Inc. (U.S. issuer; healthcare analytics)
Purchase Price and Structure: $210,000,000 (cash and CareVista common stock); customary working capital adjustments; no financing out.
Securities Law/Reg FD: These terms constitute MNPI until public announcement; any analyst or lender discussions require simultaneous public disclosure (Form 8-K and website posting) or pre-cleared wall-crossing under Reg FD.
Financing: Committed debt facility from Orchard Ridge Bank, N.A., subject to GLBA-compliant KYC and vendor onboarding forms (Annex C) and bank privacy notice alignment.
Data Processing: DPA Schedule 2 (HIPAA BAA + GLBA addendum) limits processing to the minimum necessary; retention is 6 years for HIPAA policy artifacts and 7 years for SEC/SOX records, unless shorter by policy.
Cross-Border Processing: De-identified analytics only may be transferred to MediQuant Solutions Pvt. Ltd. (Pune) under 2026-03-01 SCC data-export approval DXP-1187; no PHI, SSNs, or full PANs included.
Consent Withdrawals: Patient consent withdrawal workflow CW-442 was completed on 2026-04-15; marketing suppression lists updated; no active opt-out backlog remains.
DSAR/Erasure: Employee DSAR ER-2026-019 for Mr. Devin Arledge was fulfilled with erasure on 2026-05-10; HR payroll stubs retained under IRS/ERISA carve-outs only.
Analyst Interactions: Seabright Equity Research LLC may receive diligence materials only after broad dissemination; analyst onboarding forms require MNPI attestations and wall-crossing logs maintained by Compliance.
Selective Disclosure: Mutual NDA required; no selective disclosure to lenders, vendors, or sell-side unless a concurrent press release/8-K is filed; Rule 10b-5 anti-fraud undertakings incorporated.
Data Security for Diligence: No patient-level data will be transmitted to lenders; synthetic datasets and redacted exports will be used; a prior draft transfer of sample records was canceled and remains prohibited by policy.
Conditions to Closing: HSR filing required; no OCC change-of-control approvals are applicable (no bank target); customary board and stockholder approvals for both parties.

must_detect.matched_text:
Proposed Acquisition of HelioCare Analytics, Inc. by CareVista Therapeutics, Inc. (U.S. issuer; healthcare analytics)
Purchase Price and Structure: $210,000,000 (cash and CareVista common stock); customary working capital adjustments; no financing out.
Securities Law/Reg FD: These terms constitute MNPI until public announcement; any analyst or lender discussions require simultaneous public disclosure (Form 8-K and website posting) or pre-cleared wall-crossing under Reg FD.
Financing: Committed debt facility from Orchard Ridge Bank, N.A., subject to GLBA-compliant KYC and vendor onboarding forms (Annex C) and bank privacy notice alignment.
Data Processing: DPA Schedule 2 (HIPAA BAA + GLBA addendum) limits processing to the minimum necessary; retention is 6 years for HIPAA policy artifacts and 7 years for SEC/SOX records, unless shorter by policy.
Cross-Border Processing: De-identified analytics only may be transferred to MediQuant Solutions Pvt. Ltd. (Pune) under 2026-03-01 SCC data-export approval DXP-1187; no PHI, SSNs, or full PANs included.
Consent Withdrawals: Patient consent withdrawal workflow CW-442 was completed on 2026-04-15; marketing suppression lists updated; no active opt-out backlog remains.
DSAR/Erasure: Employee DSAR ER-2026-019 for Mr. Devin Arledge was fulfilled with erasure on 2026-05-10; HR payroll stubs retained under IRS/ERISA carve-outs only.
Analyst Interactions: Seabright Equity Research LLC may receive diligence materials only after broad dissemination; analyst onboarding forms require MNPI attestations and wall-crossing logs maintained by Compliance.
Selective Disclosure: Mutual NDA required; no selective disclosure to lenders, vendors, or sell-side unless a concurrent press release/8-K is filed; Rule 10b-5 anti-fraud undertakings incorporated.
Data Security for Diligence: No patient-level data will be transmitted to lenders; synthetic datasets and redacted exports will be used; a prior draft transfer of sample records was canceled and remains prohibited by policy.
Conditions to Closing: HSR filing required; no OCC change-of-control approvals are applicable (no bank target); customary board and stockholder approvals for both parties.
Regulatory/Compliance: A HIPAA risk assessment and GLBA vendor due diligence report will be delivered pre-signing; compliance memo CM-77 (Data Minimisation Checkpoint) signed off 2026-05-28.
Contacts: Primary—Ms. Tamsin O’Keefe, General Counsel, tokeefe@carevista-thera.example, +1-555-0162
